content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月03日 周五
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [TianhangZhuzth/Fundamental-Ava](https://github.com/TianhangZhuzth/Fundamental-Ava)
   Build digital human beings — autonomous, collaborative, and socially intelligent | ⭐752
2. [Evolink-AI/Awesome-Blender-Seedance-Workflow-Usecases](https://github.com/Evolink-AI/Awesome-Blender-Seedance-Workflow-Usecases)
   Curated Blender + Seedance workflows for AI filmmaking: previs, camera control,  | ⭐289
3. [lingbol088-spec/reverse-flow-skill](https://github.com/lingbol088-spec/reverse-flow-skill)
   面向 AI Agent / Codex 的本地 CTF 逆向工程流程技能。加载后通过“真心为你”进入逆向模式，默认在本地沙盒、CTF、crackme、warga | ⭐273
4. [scolwell/Captcha_Solver_AI](https://github.com/scolwell/Captcha_Solver_AI)
   Automatically solve text, image, and audio CAPTCHAs using AI. Supports reCAPTCHA | ⭐259
5. [Kr3n3r/ARC_Raiders_ESP___Aimbot](https://github.com/Kr3n3r/ARC_Raiders_ESP___Aimbot)
   ESP, aimbot, and radar hack for ARC Raiders (upcoming). See enemies, loot, and o | ⭐259
6. [xt4d/GameBlocks](https://github.com/xt4d/GameBlocks)
   Concise and self-explanatory building blocks that help coding agents prototype b | ⭐153
7. [HUANGCHIHHUNGLeo/claude-real-video](https://github.com/HUANGCHIHHUNGLeo/claude-real-video)
   Let Claude (or any LLM) actually watch a video — scene-aware, deduplicated frame | ⭐125
8. [Zsun79/ConferenceWatch](https://github.com/Zsun79/ConferenceWatch)
   An Agent Skill to watch the deadlines of latest AI conference. | ⭐120

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
